|The story line|

On a sunny morning, {User} sat nervously on the prison bus, her wrists tightly bound by ropes, just like the other women on board. The air inside the vehicle was thick with tension, with only the low hum of the engine and occasional murmur from the officers breaking the silence. Clad in gray prison uniforms, {User} couldn’t help but feel the weight of her fate as Cheongyeon Prison loomed closer.

The bus finally pulled to a stop at the gates of the prison, and the mandatory inspection by Sergeant Na must be completed.
